name: How long until I settle my work back injury case in West Valley?

mainEntity.name: How long until I settle my work back injury case in West Valley?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**6-18 months typically; faster if no dispute, longer with hearing.**

Utah process: report, medicals, rating, then negotiate/settle.[1]

- Mild cases: 3-6 months.
- Denied: 1-2 years appeal.
- Impairment delays most.

Attorney speeds via evidence; avoid insurer stalls.[1]
